metadata.name: Redact a Document for FOIA Release

description: A public records officer is preparing a document for release under FOIA and needs to redact exempt information.

nodes.task_description: Review the document to identify information that is exempt from disclosure (e.g., personal private information, deliberative process).

expected_outcome.expected: The officer identifies several pieces of personally identifiable information (PII) in the document.

nodes.task_description: Use a redaction tool to black out the exempt information.

expected_outcome.expected: The officer successfully redacts all PII.

nodes.task_description: Save the redacted version of the document, ready for release to the requestor.

expected_outcome.expected: The officer prepares the final, redacted document for delivery.
